levels.thumb: 1

hints.text: Put together 3 of the same color to remove from the field

levels.thumb: 2

hints.text: Wilcard quadz can be used in place of any color

levels.thumb: 3

hints.text: Put together 4 quadz of the same color to make a wildcard

levels.thumb: 4

hints.text: Put together 5 quadz of the same color to get a wildcard at the field edge

levels.thumb: 5

hints.text: Wildcards can be part of different color groups at the same time

levels.thumb: 6

hints.text: Bomb quadz kill everything around them. No wildcards are awarded and points are taken off, 1 per quad killed.

levels.thumb: 7

hints.text: Make bombs by killing multiple color groups with one shot

levels.thumb: 8
9
10
11

hints.text: Redirector cells change direction of quads moving through them

levels.thumb: 12
13
14

hints.text: Color changers change color of quads flying over them (except wildcards and bombs)

levels.thumb: 15
16
17

hints.text: Rock can only be killed with a bomb. It is not necessary to remove rocks. Preserved rocks earn extra points.

levels.thumb: 18
19
20
21

hints.text: Hit bomb with a quad to detonate

levels.thumb: 22
OK23

hints.text: Kill quadz with letters to spell level word before clearing the field

levels.thumb: ON24

hints.text: Until level word is complete, killing 4 quadz adds one of remaining letters to a random quad off the field instead of making a wildcard

levels.thumb: ABC25

hints.text: Wildcard letter can be used in place of any other letter

levels.thumb: OLD26

hints.text: Until level word is complete, killing 5 quadz adds wildcard letter to a random quad off the field

hints.text: Quadz entering in-teleport cell emerge and continue from a connected out-teleport. Tap teleport cell to see connection.

levels.thumb: 146

hints.text: Quadz entering in-teleport wait if connected out-teleport is already occupied.

levels.thumb: 147

hints.text: Several in-teleports may be connected to the same out-teleport. Touch teleport cell to see connection.

hints.text: A cell may be both in and out teleport at the same time.
